2604.06170.title: Paper Circle: An Open-source Multi-agent Research Discovery and Analysis Framework
2604.06170.paper_summary: The rapid growth of scientific literature has made it increasingly difficult for researchers to efficiently discover, evaluate, and synthesize relevant work. Recent advances in multi-agent large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong potential for understanding user intent and are being trained to utilize various tools. In this paper, we introduce Paper Circle, a multi-agent research discovery and analysis system designed to reduce the effort required to find, assess, organize, and understand academic literature. The system comprises two complementary pipelines: (1) a Discovery Pipeline that integrates offline and online retrieval from multiple sources, multi-criteria scoring, diversity-aware ranking, and structured outputs; and (2) an Analysis Pipeline that transforms individual papers into structured knowledge graphs with typed nodes such as concepts, methods, experiments, and figures, enabling graph-aware question answering and coverage verification. Both pipelines are implemented within a coder LLM-based multi-agent orchestration framework and produce fully reproducible, synchronized outputs including JSON, CSV, BibTeX, Markdown, and HTML at each agent step. This paper describes the system architecture, agent roles, retrieval and scoring methods, knowledge graph schema, and evaluation interfaces that together form the Paper Circle research workflow. We benchmark Paper Circle on both paper retrieval and paper review generation, reporting hit rate, MRR, and Recall at K. Results show consistent improvements with stronger agent models. We have publicly released the website at https://papercircle.vercel.app/ and the code at https://github.com/MAXNORM8650/papercircle.
2604.06170.paper_summary_zh: 科學文獻的快速增長使得研究人員越來越難以有效地發現、評估和綜合相關工作。最近在多代理大型語言模型（LLMs）方面的進展顯示出理解用戶意圖的強大潛力，並正在訓練利用各種工具。在本文中，我們介紹了Paper Circle，一個多代理研究發現和分析系統，旨在減少尋找、評估、組織和理解學術文獻所需的努力。該系統由兩個互補的管道組成：（1）發現管道，整合了來自多個來源的離線和在線檢索、多標準評分、多樣性意識排名和結構化輸出；以及（2）分析管道，將單個論文轉換為結構化知識圖譜，具有類型化節點，如概念、方法、實驗和圖形，從而實現圖形感知的問題回答和覆蓋驗證。這兩個管道是在基於編碼器的LLM多代理編排框架內實現的，並在每個代理步驟中生成完全可重現的同步輸出，包括JSON、CSV、BibTeX、Markdown和HTML。本文描述了系統架構、代理角色、檢索和評分方法、知識圖譜架構以及評估介面，這些共同構成了Paper Circle研究工作流程。我們在論文檢索和論文評審生成方面對Paper Circle進行了基準測試，報告了命中率、MRR和K的召回率。結果顯示，隨著更強大的代理模型，性能持續改善。我們已經公開發布了網站 https://papercircle.vercel.app/ 和代碼 https://github.com/MAXNORM8650/papercircle。
2604.06170.author: Komal Kumar et.al.
2604.06170.authors: Komal Kumar, Aman Chadha, Salman Khan, Fahad Shahbaz Khan, Hisham Cholakkal
